name: ejentum-mcp
description: MCP server exposing eight tools that retrieve task-matched cognitive operations from the Ejentum API. Four dynamic tools (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) and four adaptive tools (adaptive-reasoning, adaptive-code, adaptive-anti-deception, adaptive-memory). Adaptive tools require the Go or Super tier. Stdio via `npx -y ejentum-mcp` or hosted Streamable HTTP at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp.
long_description: Eight MCP tools call the Ejentum API and return a structured cognitive operation the calling LLM consumes before generating its response. Four dynamic tools return the top-1 matched operation from the library: reasoning (311 operations across abstraction, time, causality, simulation, spatial, metacognition), code (128 operations in the software-engineering layer), anti-deception (139 operations across sycophancy, hallucination, deception, adversarial framing, judgment, executive control), and memory (101 operations in the perception layer). Four adaptive tools (adaptive-reasoning, adaptive-code, adaptive-anti-deception, adaptive-memory) run an additional adapter LLM step that rewrites the matched operation's procedure and topology DAG with task-specific identifiers, preserving the operation's structural identity, the failure-pattern field, and the cognitive payload verbatim. Each tool takes a single `query` parameter (1-2 sentences describing the task) and returns the injection as plain text. The upstream wire shape is POST https://api.ejentum.com/harness/ with Authorization: Bearer EJENTUM_API_KEY and body `{query, mode}`; the response is `[{<mode>: <text>}]`. Two install paths use the same key: stdio via `npx -y ejentum-mcp` for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex CLI, Claude Code, Cline, Continue; or hosted Streamable HTTP at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp for n8n MCP Client and any HTTP-MCP client (no install, no subprocess). Dynamic tools are available on the 30-day free trial; adaptive tools require Go or Super tier.

ejentum_api_key.title: Ejentum API Key
ejentum_api_key.description: Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing. 30-day free trial (no card) covers all dynamic tools; adaptive tools require Go or Super tier. Stored locally; sent only to the Ejentum API as a Bearer token.
